commands.review_summary:
The PR bumps @vitest/coverage-v8, @vitest/ui, and vitest from 4.1.7 to 4.1.8 and updates the pnpm lockfile.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes: source inspection of the PR diff shows package.json only bumps three Vitest packages while pnpm-lock.yaml also changes unrelated runtime dependency resolutions.
